name: Two Hat
description: Two Hat — AI content moderation platform with contextual analysis for gaming, social, and UGC platforms with appeal workflows.

seo.title: Two Hat — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Two Hat: Two Hat — AI content moderation platform with contextual analysis for gaming, social, and UGC platforms with appeal workflows.

when_to_use: Moderating text and image content with contextual AI understanding
Building community standards enforcement for gaming and social
Deploying scalable content moderation with human escalation queue
Running real-time moderation APIs for in-game and forum content

pros: Mature platform, long track record in gaming and kids
cons: Community feature set largely absorbed into Azure
review.verdict: Historically a strong moderation platform, but evaluate carefully given Microsoft's reshuffling of the product.
review.best_for: Gaming and kids platforms aligned with Microsoft's ecosystem roadmap.
review.not_for: Teams wanting independent vendors or fully self-serve developer APIs.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence
